title: Black Stainless Steel Kitchen Roll Holder and Mug Tree Set Paper Towel Holder Kitchen Towel Holder & Cup Holder with 6 Hooks Weighted Anti-Slip Base Stylish Mug Holder Stand
features: Complete Kitchen Set – The Royal Cuisine kitchen roll holder and mug tree set keeps your space neat, organised, and stylish. Perfect for holding paper towels and up to six mugs or cups.
Durable Stainless Steel Build – Made from premium stainless steel, this towel holder and mug holder are built to last. Rust-resistant, sturdy, and ideal for everyday use in busy kitchens.
Weighted Anti-Slip Base – Designed with stability in mind, both the paper towel holder and cup holder feature a weighted base with anti-slip pads to prevent tipping or sliding on countertops.
Modern & Space-Saving Design – The sleek black kitchen towel holder and mug tree set adds a modern touch to any décor while saving valuable countertop space. Perfect for small or large kitchens.
Versatile Kitchen Accessories – Whether you’re drying mugs, storing cups, or keeping towels accessible, this stylish kitchen roll holder and mug holder set enhances both function and appearance.
description: Keep your kitchen organized and elegant with the Royal Cuisine Kitchen Roll Holder and Mug Tree Set , designed to blend modern style with everyday practicality. Crafted from durable stainless steel and finished in sleek black , this set adds a touch of sophistication to any kitchen while helping you manage space efficiently. The kitchen roll holder securely holds standard sized paper towels, keeping them within easy reach for quick clean ups and daily use. Its smooth pole design ensures easy tearing, while the weighted anti-slip base provides excellent stability, preventing the stand from sliding or tipping during use. Paired perfectly with a matching mug tree , this set can hold up to six mugs or cups neatly, keeping your countertop clutter free. The cup holder ’s sturdy hooks are well spaced to fit different mug sizes, from everyday coffee cups to larger tea mugs, allowing them to air dry naturally. Designed for both practicality and aesthetics, this kitchen towel holder and mug holder set offers a compact, stylish storage solution that complements all kitchen interior, from contemporary to classic. Easy to clean and resistant to rust, it’s the perfect combination of function and style. Upgrade your kitchen accessories with the Royal Cuisine paper towel holder and mug tree set, a durable, space saving, and elegant addition to any home that keeps your kitchen essentials beautifully organized. Dimensions Approximately: 35 cm height x 15 cm diameter
